name: Princess Curran
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔法の国の王女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>プリンセス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－クラン
desc: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except with "Trial of the Princesses". During your Standby Phase, inflict 600 damage to your opponent for each monster they control.
mnst_eff: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except with "Trial of the Princesses". During your Standby Phase, inflict 600 damage to your opponent for each monster they control.
eff: This card cannot be Normal Summoned or Set. This card cannot be Special Summoned except with "Trial of the Princesses". During your Standby Phase, inflict 600 damage to your opponent for each monster they control.
